title: The Bible
description: Adds the entire CPDV translation of the Bible as an item.
body:
![Golden Leaf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdde4d98a4fba6b2cd855ef1dc65d22d319a9960.png)
![The Bible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9de6cceec7224b4ab0f317c43728b1fbb401f1c.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7W0LUHevl8s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Imperium Instrumenti](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f70895d297d3ffeb8fdbae8880bed0e89c293f6c.png)
- LMB = Next chapter
- RMB = Previous chapter
- LMB + Middle Mouse = Next book
- RMB + Middle Mouse = Previous book
- Mouse 4 and 5 can also navigate books

![Alia Imperium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1b1d76617623da3e77df661c4cd6e3756da972f.png)
- RMB opens the interface
- RMB can heal certain (base game) mobs back into their original form
- Hitting a monster will burn their flesh. Deals bonus damage if the monster is fire resistant. Also deals a small part of max health as damage
- Hitting a non-monster will heal them
  
![Creatio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1d4cbfb15bbd2ebcea63c92abb58f645a5133c0.png)
![Crafting recipe consists of 1 mutton, 4 gold bars in cross shape, 1 torch, 1 bookshelf, 1 apple and 1 diamond sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1c7826f670a9650787171446c4491561347232a.jpeg)

![Creatores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e09437d03994dc084d79d87738c0d3241ad4314b.png)
Ronald L. Conte Jr - creation of the CPDV https://www.sacredbible.org/catholic/
Starbound - original base of book texture
Freef - coding and re-texture

![Et plus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1f39041c11b0153e1bbb74d055a8bcf24dc91e7.png)
Want to see my mods for other games? [Click here!](https://linktr.ee/catholicfreef)

Also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-bible)


![Golden Leaf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a012d802a5170bbe201b2da48dc4f8f55aa7c64a.png)
